title: Tax Appeals/Audit Assistance - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Financial Wellness > Tax Appeals/Audit Assistance 3 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE OREGON TAXPAYER ADVOCATE SERVICE OFFICE PORTLAND TAXPAYER ADVOCATE SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Taxpayer Advocate Service (LTA) is an IRS program that provides an independent review to try and resolve tax problems which have not been resolved through normal channels. Can assist in cases where taxpayers are facing hardships. Identifies issues that comprise taxpayer rights. Most issues are handled by mail, phone, and fax. 220 SW 3rd Avenue Suite G044 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4:30pm; closed on federal holidays Email (877) 777-4778 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON PORTLAND REGIONAL OFFICE LOW INCOME TAXPAYER CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help with federal tax issues to people who cannot afford a private attorney. Represents clients in tax court, deals with liens and levies, assists with audits and examinations, settles tax debts, appeals Earned Income Credit denials, and helps with Innocent Spouse Relief and Injured Spouse claims. Eligibility: Must meet income eligibility guidelines. Amount in controversy for each tax year at issue must be under $50,000. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-11:50am and 1pm-3:50pm (503) 295-9499 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON LAW CENTER OREGON LAW CENTER PORTLAND REGIONAL OFFICE OREGON LAW CENTER TAX CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides free legal representation to low income Oregonians who have controversies with the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) which may include, but are not limited to: audits and return modifications, missing refunds, misclassification/self-employment tax, and outstanding debts. Also provides free consultations to individuals who may not qualify for services but have questions about issues with the IRS or Oregon Department of Revenue. 621 SW Morrison Street Suite 1450 Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Consultations: Unrestricted Legal representation: Individuals with a household income at or below 250% of the federal poverty level Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm by appointment only Email (800) 672-4919 Get Directions Visit Website More Details INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE OREGON TAXPAYER ADVOCATE SERVICE OREGON LAW CENTER OREGON LAW CENTER TAX CLINIC
